All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Exception Summary 
    Class Description
    ApplicationExceptionHandlerCtl
    Handles application propagated exceptions Akbar Mansuri
    AttachmentDAOImpl
    AttachmentDAOImpl is the implementation class of AttachmentDAOInt.
    AttachmentDAOInt
    AttachmentDAOInt is a Data Access Object (DAO) interface for performing database operations on AttachmentDTO.
    AttachmentDTO
    AttachmentDTO is a Data Transfer Object (DTO) class that represents attachment details such as file name, type, description, and binary document data.
    AttachmentServiceImpl
    AttachmentServiceImpl is the implementation class of AttachmentServiceInt.
    AttachmentServiceInt
    AttachmentServiceInt is a service interface for handling business operations related to AttachmentDTO.
    BaseCtl<F extends BaseForm,​T extends BaseDTO,​S extends BaseServiceInt<T>>  
    BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>  
    BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    BaseDAOInt is a generic interface that defines basic CRUD operations and search functionality for DTOs.
    BaseDTO
    BaseDTO is an abstract superclass for all DTO (Data Transfer Object) classes.
    BaseForm
    BaseForm is a generic form class that provides common fields and functionality for all form objects in the application.
    BaseServiceImpl<T extends BaseDTO,​D extends BaseDAOInt<T>>
    BaseServiceImpl is a generic service implementation class that provides common CRUD operations for any DTO type.
    BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    BaseServiceInt is a generic service interface that defines standard CRUD operations for any DTO type.
    ChangePasswordForm
    Form class for changing a user's password.
    CollegeCtl
    CollegeCtl handles REST requests related to College.
    CollegeDAOImpl
    CollegeDAOImpl is the implementation class for CollegeDAOInt interface.
    CollegeDAOInt
    CollegeDAOInt is an interface that defines data access operations for CollegeDTO objects.
    CollegeDTO  
    CollegeForm
    Form class for capturing College details.
    CollegeServiceImpl
    CollegeServiceImpl provides the implementation of CollegeServiceInt interface.
    CollegeServiceInt
    CollegeServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for CollegeDTO objects.
    CourseCtl
    CourseCtl handles REST requests related to Course.
    CourseDAOImpl
    CourseDAOImpl is the implementation class for CourseDAOInt interface.
    CourseDAOInt
    CourseDAOInt is an interface that defines data access operations for CourseDTO objects.
    CourseDTO
    CourseDTO represents a course entity in the system.
    CourseForm  
    CourseServiceImpl
    CourseServiceImpl provides the implementation of CourseServiceInt interface.
    CourseServiceInt
    CourseServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for CourseDTO objects.
    DatabaseException
    Custom exception thrown for database-related errors.
    DepartmentCtl
    DepartmentCtl handles REST requests related to Department.
    DepartmentDAOImpl  
    DepartmentDAOInt  
    DepartmentDTO
    DepartmentDTO represents a department entity in the system.
    DepartmentForm
    Form class for capturing Department details.
    DepartmentServiceImpl  
    DepartmentServiceInt  
    DropdownList
    DropdownList is a generic interface that provides a standard structure for DTOs or objects that can be used to populate dropdown menus in the UI.
    DuplicateRecordException
    Custom exception thrown when a duplicate record is encountered.
    EmailBuilder
    EmailBuilder class provides static utility methods to generate HTML email messages for various user account actions such as registration, password recovery, and password change.
    EmailCtl
    Controller to test sending emails via EmailServiceInt.
    EmailMessage
    EmailMessage class represents an email with its basic attributes such as recipient, subject, message content, and message type.
    EmailServiceImpl
    Implementation of EmailServiceInt to send emails using JavaMailSender.
    EmailServiceInt
    Interface for sending email messages.
    FacultlyDAOImpl
    FacultlyDAOImpl is the implementation class for FacultyDAOInt interface.
    FacultyCtl
    FacultyCtl handles REST requests related to Faculty.
    FacultyDAOInt
    FacultyDAOInt is an interface that defines data access operations for FacultyDTO objects.
    FacultyDTO
    FacultyDTO represents a faculty member entity in the system.
    FacultyForm
    Form class for capturing Faculty details.
    FacultyServiceImpl
    FacultyServiceImpl provides the implementation of FacultyServiceInt interface.
    FacultyServiceInt
    FacultyServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for FacultyDTO objects.
    ForgetPasswordForm
    ForgetPasswordForm is used to capture the login ID for password recovery.
    JasperCtl
    JasperCtl is responsible for generating PDF reports using JasperReports.
    JWTRequestFilter
    JWTRequestFilter is a Spring Security filter that intercepts each HTTP request to validate JWT tokens and set the security context.
    JWTUserDetailsService
    JWTUserDetailsService implements Spring Security's UserDetailsService.
    JWTUtil
    JWTUtil is a utility class for generating, validating, and extracting claims from JSON Web Tokens (JWTs).
    LoginCtl
    LoginCtl is a REST controller for authentication-related operations.
    LoginForm
    LoginForm is a simple form class used to capture user login credentials.
    MarksheetCtl
    MarksheetCtl is a REST controller for managing marksheet-related operations.
    MarksheetDAOImpl
    MarksheetDAOImpl is the implementation class for MarksheetDAOInt interface.
    MarksheetDAOInt
    MarksheetDAOInt is an interface that defines data access operations for MarksheetDTO objects.
    MarksheetDTO
    MarksheetDTO represents a student's marksheet entity in the system.
    MarksheetForm
    MarksheetForm is a form class used to capture and validate marks for a student in various subjects such as Physics, Chemistry, and Maths.
    MarksheetServiceImpl
    MarksheetServiceImpl provides the implementation of MarksheetServiceInt interface.
    MarksheetServiceInt
    MarksheetServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for MarksheetDTO objects.
    MyProfileForm
    MyProfileForm is a form class used to capture and validate the profile information of a user.
    NotificationCtl
    NotificationCtl is a REST controller for managing notification-related operations.
    NotificationDAOImpl  
    NotificationDAOInt  
    NotificationDTO
    NotificationDTO represents a notification entity in the system.
    NotificationForm  
    NotificationServiceImpl  
    NotificationServiceInt  
    ORSProject10application
    Main Spring Boot application class for ORS Project 10 Author: Akbar Mansuri
    ORSResponse
    ORSResponse is a generic response wrapper used to send back responses from controllers or services in the application.
    RoleCtl
    RoleCtl is a REST controller for managing role-related operations.
    RoleDAOImpl
    RoleDAOImpl is the implementation class for RoleDAOInt interface.
    RoleDAOInt
    RoleDAOInt is an interface that defines data access operations for RoleDTO objects.
    RoleDTO
    RoleDTO represents a user role entity in the system.
    RoleForm
    RoleForm is a form class used for capturing and transferring role-related data from the presentation layer to the business layer.
    RoleServiceImpl
    RoleServiceImpl provides the implementation of RoleServiceInt interface.
    RoleServiceInt
    RoleServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for RoleDTO objects.
    StudentCtl
    StudentCtl is a REST controller for managing student-related operations.
    StudentDAOImpl
    Data Access Object implementation for StudentDTO entities.
    StudentDAOInt
    Data Access Object interface for StudentDTO entities.
    StudentDTO
    StudentDTO represents a student entity in the system.
    StudentForm
    StudentForm is a form class used for capturing and transferring student-related data from the presentation layer to the business layer.
    StudentServiceImpl
    StudentServiceImpl provides the implementation of StudentServiceInt interface.
    StudentServiceInt
    StudentServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for StudentDTO objects.
    SubjectCtl
    SubjectCtl is a REST controller for managing subject-related operations.
    SubjectDAOImpl
    Implementation of SubjectDAOInt for managing SubjectDTO entities.
    SubjectDAOInt
    Data Access Object interface for SubjectDTO.
    SubjectDTO
    SubjectDTO represents a subject entity associated with a course.
    SubjectForm
    SubjectForm is a form class used for capturing and transferring subject-related data from the presentation layer to the business layer.
    SubjectServiceImpl
    SubjectServiceImpl provides the implementation of SubjectServiceInt interface.
    SubjectServiceInt
    SubjectServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for SubjectDTO objects.
    TestCtl
    TestCtl is a simple REST controller used for testing purposes.
    TimeTableCtl
    TimeTableCtl is a REST controller for managing timetable-related operations.
    TimeTableDAOImpl
    Implementation of TimeTableDAOInt interface.
    TimeTableDAOInt
    Data Access Object Interface for TimeTableDTO.
    TimeTableDTO
    TimeTableDTO represents a timetable or exam schedule entry for a course and subject.
    TimeTableForm
    TimeTableForm is a form class used for capturing and transferring timetable-related data from the presentation layer to the business layer.
    TimeTableServiceImpl
    TimeTableServiceImpl provides the implementation of TimeTableServiceInt interface.
    TimeTableServiceInt
    TimeTableServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for TimeTableDTO objects.
    UserContext
    UserContext class holds information about the currently logged-in user.
    UserContextHolder
    UserContextHolder provides a thread-safe mechanism to store and access the current user's UserContext using ThreadLocal.
    UserCtl
    UserCtl is a REST controller for managing user-related operations.
    UserDAOImpl
    Data Access Object Implementation for UserDTO.
    UserDAOInt
    Data Access Object interface for User.
    UserDTO  
    UserForm
    UserForm is a form class used for capturing and transferring user data from the presentation layer to the business layer.
    UserRegistrationForm
    UserRegistrationForm is a form class used to capture user registration details.
    UserServiceImpl
    UserServiceImpl provides the implementation of UserServiceInt interface.
    UserServiceInt
    UserServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for UserDTO objects.
    WebSecurityConfig
    WebSecurityConfig configures Spring Security for the application.
